context: Tests whether the agent writes the image generation script using the gemini-2.5-flash-image model with the correct uv script header, uses appropriate aspect ratios for product images, follows the product photography prompt pattern, and includes the correct staged upload steps in notes or code.

checklist.name: Script file created
checklist.description: scripts/generate_teabox_images.py exists and is a non-empty Python file

checklist.name: Correct model name
checklist.description: Script uses 'gemini-2.5-flash-image' as the model identifier (not any other Gemini model name)

checklist.name: uv script header format
checklist.description: Script begins with the uv/PEP 723 script header: '# /// script', '# requires-python = ">=3.11"', '# dependencies = [...]' — all three lines present in that format

checklist.name: google-genai dependency
checklist.description: Script header dependencies list includes google-genai (e.g., 'google-genai>=0.3.0' or similar)

checklist.name: Aspect ratio — 1:1 used
checklist.description: Script uses 1:1 aspect ratio for at least one image (the primary product card or gallery default)

checklist.name: Product photography prompt pattern
checklist.description: Image prompts follow the pattern: 'Product photograph of [item] on [surface]. [Lighting]. Mood: [editorial/lifestyle/minimalist]. No people. No readable text or logos...'

checklist.name: API key from dotenv
checklist.description: Script uses load_dotenv() and os.environ['GOOGLE_API_KEY'] (or similar env-var loading) rather than hardcoding the key

checklist.name: Output saved to generated/ directory
checklist.description: Script saves generated images to a generated/ directory or generated/<product>_*.png path

checklist.name: Template file created
checklist.description: templates/product.subscription.json exists and is a non-empty JSON file

checklist.name: SKU convention documented
checklist.description: product_setup_notes.md or equivalent documents the SKU naming convention following <BRAND>-<HANDLE>-<VARIANT> pattern (e.g., TBX-SAMPLER-MO or similar)

checklist.name: templateSuffix instruction
checklist.description: Notes or output explains that the product's templateSuffix must be set to 'subscription' to match the templates/product.subscription.json filename
